allow:
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /PID 24064 2>&1"
cmd /c "taskkill /F /PID 3396 2>&1"
cmd /c "taskkill /F /PID 21704 2>&1"
sleep 3
netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | grep ":5001" | head -3
echo "Done")

Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /T /PID 3396 & taskkill /F /T /PID 21704 & taskkill /F /T /PID 24064"
sleep 3
netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | grep ":5001"
echo "Port clear check done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 3396,21704,24064 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
sleep 3
netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | grep ":5001"
echo "Done")
